title: 1985 Denver Mini Classic,  Boys 10 11, Criterium Awards Ceremony

enrichment.summary: An announcer reads the results of the Boys 10-11 Criterium at the 1985 Denver Mini Classic awards ceremony. Kyle Pounds (number 38) is called out in sixth place, and subsequent places through second are announced with ribbons and gift certificates from sponsors including McDonald's and BNH Sports.
enrichment.speaker: other

claims.subject: Kyle Pounds
claims.claim: Kyle Pounds won sixth place, receiving a ribbon and a gift certificate from McDonald's.

claims.subject: Tim Helgen
claims.claim: Tim Helgen won fifth place, receiving a ribbon and a gift certificate from McDonald's.

claims.subject: Eric Owen
claims.claim: Eric Owen won fourth place, receiving a ribbon and a gift certificate.

claims.subject: Mike Turley
claims.claim: Mike Turley won third place, receiving a ribbon and a five-dollar gift certificate from DINN verse spoke.

claims.subject: Mike Constantino
claims.claim: Mike Constantino won second place, receiving a twenty-five-dollar gift certificate from BNH Sports.

transcript.text: Receiving the sixth place ribbon and a gift certificate from McDonald's, number 38, Kyle
In fifth place, also the winner of a preen, number 34, receiving a fifth place ribbon
And a gift certificate from McDonald's, number 34, Tim Haugen.
And in fourth place, also receiving a gift certificate and ribbon, number 37, Eric Owen.
Now on to the awards blocks, receiving the third place ribbon on the third place position
On the awards blocks, as well as a $5 gift certificate from the Denver Spoke, number 41, Mike Turley.
Mike will maintain the race leader jersey that he wore this afternoon in the Criterion.
Now on to second place, number 35, first place ribbon, as well as a $25 gift certificate
From B&H Sports, number 33, Mike Constantino.
Three salutes for the 10-11 boys, Brittany and Clark Criterion.
And one more to the west.
All right, let's give him one final hand.
